Home › Seminole County › Altamonte Springs › Vegetarian Restaurants

Vegetarian Restaurants in Altamonte Springs

Most of the restaurants with vegetarian options in Altamonte Springs grade well: 10 of 15 hold an A, led by AREPAS, CAFE AND MORE at a perfect 100/100. Every listing below carries its latest Florida health grade.

15 vegetarian restaurants

  • A 100 A
    AREPAS, CAFE AND MORE American ★ 4.4 (1124) Altamonte Springs · Seminole County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Apr 2026
  • A 99 P
